questions.question: Explain the term Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its significance in the modern world, referring to Chapter 1 of the textbook.
questions.hint: Provide a brief overview of AI and its applications.

questions.question: Describe the problem space of artificial intelligence, highlighting the challenges and difficulties faced by AI researchers and developers, as discussed in Chapter 1 of the textbook.
questions.hint: Outline the key problems and difficulties in the field of AI.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the search approach in artificial intelligence, and how does it relate to the problems discussed in Chapter 1 of the textbook?
questions.hint: Explain the application of search in AI and its connection to the problems faced.
